title: FOREWORD: Network Approach for Studying the Prehistoric Networks
author: Shydlovskyi, Pavlo
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This volume represents a part of the materials which were highlighted as the reports at the international scientific conference “Wetland Archaeology and Prehistoric Networks in Europe that was held in Kyiv and Kaniv from the 15th to the 18th of September 2017 [Wetland… 2017]. This conference was the final event of the Institutional Partnership Programme (SCOPES) “Network in Eastern European Neolithic and Wetland Archaeology for the improvement of field techniques and dating methods (NEENAWA)”, funded by the Swiss National Science Foundation (SNSF) [Hafner et al. 2015]. Here we are delighted to present some concluding remarks on its scope and achievements.
